parties.name: CONRAD W. YEE AND ROSING YEE LIVING, DATED DECEMBER 11, 1995

calendar.matters:
Petition To Establish Trust Terms, Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms Under Pr
Off Calendar Jul-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sarah Wessels Summerall for Petitioner.

The Court expressed concern about the consent of August 15, 2019 and November 5, 2019 stating that they are identical, and it looks like a copy and paste job, informed Counsel that she should have an e-mail address on her pleadings and noted that page 9 of the amended petition shows different addresses for the adult children. Ms. Summerall stated that they were trying to get wet signatures and electronic signatures to the Court, that the Beneficiaries have consented several times to the petition, that wet signatures were submitted on Friday and that they had everyone sign by DocuSign. The Court stated that the amended petition adds new terms and needs new consents, and questions whether they are treating the petition as the agreement. Ms. Summerall stated that they are treating the petition as the agreement. Ms. Summerall also stated that Mrs. Yee has an account that is titled in the trust, that she is okay with the Court saying that there is no trust/that it does not exist, that Mrs. Yee has not been able to access the account for nine months and that Mrs. Yee does not have a signed trust document. In addition, Ms. Summerall stated that the account was titled jointly prior to being titled in the trust and that she thinks the bank will change the account back to a joint account if there is no trust. The Petition to Establish Trust Terms, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
